author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for coordinator + tasks subsystem (LocalMainSession/Dream/InProcessTeammate/LocalShell/RemoteAgent) — read CC coordinatorMode.ts (~369), LocalMainSessionTask.ts (~479), DreamTask.ts (~157). Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research, not Rust. Phase 2 implementations tracked under #606 (DreamTask), #607 (InProcessTeammateTask), #609 (LocalMainSessionTask background semantics), #611 (LocalShellTask). Parent feature #507 covers the umbrella. Owner-level external research.
